title: Spicy Kenyan Kebab Recipe
description: A flavorful and spicy kebab recipe inspired by Kenyan cuisine, featuring marinated meat and vegetables grilled to perfection.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine almond butter, intensely spicy sauce, and lime juice. Blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together the marinade mixture, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken breast to the marinade and mix well to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated chicken, bell peppers, onions, zucchini, and tomatoes onto skewers.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Brush the grill or grill pan with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or parsley if desired.
